title: ESCALATE: 401 response is HTML not JSON (missing Bottle error handler)

text: {"type":"escalate","finding":"401 response is HTML not JSON","severity":"Important","description":"The check_auth before_request hook calls abort(401, ...) but Bottle's default error handler renders it as HTML. The server has @app.error(404) and @app.error(500) handlers but no @app.error(401). This violates the DESIGN.md spec that all responses are Content-Type: application/json. Only affects API consumers who parse error response bodies — the renderer checks status codes, not bodies.","options":[{"label":"Option 1: Add @app.error(401) handler","solution":"Add @app.error(401) handler returning JSON, matching existing 404/500 pattern. 3-line change in server.py after line 127.","pros":"Matches DESIGN.md spec, consistent with existing error handlers, low regression risk, easy to test","cons":"The abort body is ignored by custom error handlers so JSON body is hardcoded in handler"},{"label":"Option 2: Restructure check_auth to use response object","solution":"Replace abort() with direct response manipulation in check_auth","pros":"More explicit control over response","cons":"before_request hooks in Bottle cannot easily short-circuit requests; abort is the standard way"},{"label":"Option 3: Defer","solution":"No change — status code 401 is correct, only the body format is wrong","pros":"Zero risk, renderer already handles this correctly via status code check","cons":"API contract violation remains for any direct API consumers"}],"recommendation":"Option 1 — straightforward 3-line fix matching existing pattern. Low regression risk. QA assessment: genuine coverage gap exists (content-type not asserted in tests)."}
